reason_for_decision: The article now explains tracking as an estimation process and makes TWS operationally meaningful enough to pass the stricter review.
strengths: It now explains initiation, maintenance, coasting, and termination rather than only defining TWS.
The article correctly separates track count from tracking quality.
It connects radar tracking to downstream operator workflows.
summary_assessment: This article passes. It is clear enough for beginners while still preserving the technical ideas that matter.
